World Gallery

Art and architecture from everywhere — 10488 works, 10 regions, 1944 named artists.

By region

379 works
Africa
Ife, Benin, Great Zimbabwe, Lalibela, Djenné.
608 works
Egypt & Nubia
Pyramids, Nefertiti, Karnak, Abu Simbel, Meroë.
308 works
Mesopotamia & Persia
Ishtar Gate, Hammurabi, Lamassu, Persepolis.
442 works
Mediterranean
Parthenon, Venus de Milo, Laocoön, Pompeii.
3493 works
Europe
Kells, Chartres, Sistine Chapel, Rembrandt, Van Gogh.
806 works
Islamic World
Alhambra, Dome of the Rock, Córdoba, Isfahan.
953 works
South Asia
Taj Mahal, Ajanta, Khajuraho, Chola bronze, Sanchi.
2209 works
East Asia
Terracotta Army, Forbidden City, Hokusai, Hōryū-ji.
419 works
Southeast Asia & Oceania
Angkor Wat, Borobudur, Bagan, Moai, Aboriginal rock art.
871 works
Americas
Teotihuacan, Palenque, Sun Stone, Machu Picchu, Nazca.
